message:
brand(web): rename WASM JS entry from frankenterm_web to FrankenTerm

Update wasm-pack build commands with --out-name FrankenTerm so the
JS module entry point is branded as FrankenTerm.js instead of
frankenterm_web.js. Update import paths and expected output file names
in showcase demo HTML and getting-started docs.

Closes bd-siuzn

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
